_doc: Config blocks for the MISSION wizard — what you task an agent to do. The FIELD DEFINITIONS now live as classes in fields.py (fields.MISSION_FIELD_ORDER), the single source mission_forge._schema() builds from; adding a Field subclass grows the wizard. This file keeps only the non-field config: the header and the seal prompt. Fields reuse the shared forge shape strategies (str/csv/predicate/optfloat/toolkit).
header: ═ Author a mission ═  (title + goal required; blank = inherit the agent's default)
seal_prompt: Mission is coherent. Seal it? (blank to cancel, or type a note to confirm)
